channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Albanese begins Pacific diplomacy tour with Fiji security pact and regional talks
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has begun a three-day diplomatic visit across the Pacific, starting in Fiji where he is expected to sign a new security agreement known as the Vuvale Union with Fijian ...

item.title: Albanese begins Pacific diplomatic tour with Fiji security pact and regional talks
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has arrived in Fiji to begin a three-day diplomatic visit across the Pacific aimed at strengthening Australia's relationships with key regional partners and reinforcing...

item.title: Tanzania government promotes digital reforms and youth inclusion in cooperatives
item.description: The Tanzanian government has called for cooperative societies to modernize operations and expand inclusivity, emphasizing their role in economic development and social stability. During the 2026 Inter...

item.title: High Court Acquits Teacher and Carpenter in Kigoma Murder Case Due to Insufficient Evidence
item.description: In a recent judgment delivered on Friday, July 3, 2026, at the High Court Kigoma Sub-Registry, three men from Tanzania were acquitted of murder charges. The accused, Mr Barnabas Andrea who works as a ...

item.title: AI Efficiency Drive and Its Effects on Global Jobs: Why Some Inefficiency May Still Be Needed
item.description: This article by Tope Fasua wey dey discuss how the world dey pursue efficiency too much through Artificial Intelligence. The writer talk say maybe the problem no be just efficiency, but we need to loo...

item.title: Leclerc leads the British Grand Prix as Hamilton battles Verstappen for a podium place at Silverstone
item.description: The live coverage follows the 2026 Formula 1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone, where Ferrari's Charles Leclerc leads the race during the closing stages after an intense strategic battle with Mercedes...

item.title: Britain says Russian hybrid operations have intensified amid continued support for Ukraine
item.description: Britain is facing what security experts describe as an increasingly aggressive Russian hybrid warfare campaign linked to London's military and political support for Ukraine. According to the report, r...

item.title: Cheslin Kolbe highlights areas for improvement after Springboks' win over England
item.description: Cheslin Kolbe, the Springboks' try-scoring winger, acknowledged that his team is 'far from perfect' following their 45-21 victory over England in the Nations Championship opener. Despite the win, Kolb...

item.title: Remembering Prince Nazir Ado Ibrahim: A Tribute to a Legendary Figure
item.description: Femi Fani-Kayode pays heartfelt tribute to Prince Nazir Ado Ibrahim, reflecting on their shared childhood, adventurous youth, and lifelong brotherhood. The article highlights their bond as bridge betw...

item.title: Former Los Angeles City Council member and civil rights leader Billy G. Mills dies at 96
item.description: Billy G. Mills, a pioneering civil rights attorney and one of the first Black men elected to the Los Angeles City Council, has died at the age of 96. He passed away on June 27 after a period of declin...

item.title: White House Press Secretary Criticizes Gen Z for 'Laziness' in Controversial Interview

item.title: 1972 Photo Shows Goalkeeper John Osborne Smoking During a West Bromwich Albion Match
item.description: A striking photograph from 1972 captures West Bromwich Albion goalkeeper John Osborne smoking a cigarette while standing on the pitch during a professional football match. The image reflects a very di...

item.title: Nairobi Governor Candidate Agnes Kagure's Group Provides Clean Water to Kisii Village Residents
item.description: Nairobi gubernatorial aspirant Agnes Kagure's grassroots lobby group, Mbogi ya Mama, delivered clean water to residents of Kisii Village in Nairobi South after they had faced prolonged water shortages...

item.title: Iran's new leader absent during public tribute as Khamenei's other sons attend memorial
item.description: The article reports that Iran's new leader was absent during a public event where the other sons of Ali Khamenei paid their respects to the country's supreme leader. Based on the available information...

item.title: International rescue efforts save Venezuelan earthquake victim after 8 days
item.description: A Venezuelan man trapped under rubble for eight days after a devastating earthquake was successfully rescued by a multinational team of firefighters, including volunteers from Los Angeles. The operati...

item.title: French wildfires pose threat to Tour de France's third stage
item.description: Wildfires in southwest France have raised concerns about the safety of the Tour de France's third stage, which is set to finish in Les Angles, 60 kilometres from the blaze. Race director Christian Pru...

item.title: Prosecution team attends Mass in Pasay ahead of opening of Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: Some members of the prosecution team in the impeachment case against Vice President Sara Duterte attended a Mass on Sunday at the Archdiocesan Shrine of Jesus in Pasay City, just a day before the form...

item.title: Kisumu woman says accidental phone call exposed alleged land fraud before she completed property purchase
item.description: A woman from Kisumu, Orudo Nyar Ojuok HSC, has shared how an accidental phone call helped her avoid what she believes was a well-planned land scam. She had been looking for land along the road between...

item.title: Ogu Community for Bayelsa State Celebrate Ogbolo ’26 New Yam Festival to Preserve Culture and Promote Peace
item.description: The Ogu Community inside Otubo-Atissa, Yenagoa Local Government Area of Bayelsa State, don show strong commitment to their culture, peace and development by celebrating the annual Uge Adiafa New Yam F...

item.title: Live coverage of England vs Australia in the Women’s T20 World Cup final at Lord’s
